## Checklist

- [ ] `pythonista_job_runner/config.yaml` version bumped (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] `pythonista_job_runner/CHANGELOG.md` updated (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] Documentation updated (`pythonista_job_runner/DOCS.md`) if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] Tests are green (`python -m pytest -q`) or rationale given if not applicable
- [ ] Verified in Home Assistant (install or update, then basic smoke test)
- [ ] No secrets or tokens committed
